category_sources: source_facts.description says Funções ZZ provides dozens of command-line mini-applications in Portuguese; official site describes 190 mini-applications for UNIX-like command lines.
display_name_sources: Official site heading and source_facts.name identify the project as Funções ZZ/funcoeszz.
docs_sources: Official repository README lists the GitHub wiki as the documentation/wiki surface; official site also has docs navigation.
repo_sources: Official download page says Git users can clone the complete repository; official repository README lists https://github.com/funcoeszz/funcoeszz as GitHub.
tags_sources: source_facts.description, official site, and official repository README describe many command-line utility mini-applications.
